  1. ch.varani.bricks.ble.api

Uses of Class
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.BleException

Packages that use BleException
Package
Description
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl
Fluent internal DSL built on top of the public BLE API.
ch.varani.bricks.ble.impl.macos
 
ch.varani.bricks.ble.util
 

  • Uses of BleException in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api

    Methods in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api that throw BleException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BleConnection.close()
    Convenience method that calls BleConnection.disconnect() and blocks until it completes, to satisfy the AutoCloseable contract for try-with-resources usage.
    void
    BleScanner.close()
    Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by this scanner.
    static @NonNull BleScanner
    BleScannerFactory.create()
    Creates and returns a new BleScanner backed by the platform BLE stack appropriate for the current operating system.

  • Uses of BleException in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl

    Methods in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl that throw BleException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BrickDsl.close()
    Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by the underlying scanner.
    void
    ConnectionDsl.close()
    Closes the connection; delegates to ConnectionDsl.done().
    @NonNull List<BleDevice>
    ScanDsl.collect(int count)
    Starts a scan and blocks until count devices have been discovered or the configured timeout elapses, then stops the scan.
    void
    BuWizz2Dsl.done()
    Disconnects the BuWizz 2.0 brick and releases all resources.
    void
    BuWizz3Dsl.done()
    Disconnects the BuWizz 3.0 brick and releases all resources.
    void
    CircuitCubesDsl.done()
    Disconnects the Circuit Cubes brick and releases all resources.
    void
    ConnectionDsl.done()
    Disconnects the peripheral and releases all associated resources.
    void
    LegoDsl.done()
    Disconnects the hub and releases all resources.
    void
    SBrickDsl.done()
    Disconnects the SBrick and releases all resources.
    @NonNull DeviceDsl
    ScanDsl.first()
    Starts a scan and blocks until the first device is discovered, then stops the scan.
    static @NonNull BrickDsl
    BrickDsl.open()
    Creates a new BrickDsl session backed by the platform BLE stack.
    @NonNull ConnectionDsl
    DeviceDsl.thenConnect()
    Initiates a BLE connection to the wrapped device and returns a ConnectionDsl for the active session.

    Description
     
    MacOsBleScanner()
    Constructs a MacOsBleScanner by loading the native library and initialising the CoreBluetooth central manager.

    NativeLibraryLoader.load(String libraryName)
